slides.headline: An understairs storage specialist we work with had brilliant work — and nowhere to send people.
slides.body: His installs get shared everywhere. Swipe.

slides.headline: Every enquiry came with a hundred questions.
slides.body: Sizes, finishes, lead times. He couldn't answer them all, fast enough.

slides.headline: So people drifted off.
slides.body: Interested, then gone — because nobody got back to them quick enough.

slides.headline: We built him a chat + voice website.
slides.body: It answers the common questions instantly and books a measure-up — typing or talking, 24/7.

slides.headline: His website handles the back-and-forth so he can stay in the workshop.
Great work, slow replies?
slides.save: Save this if questions pile up faster than you answer
